proof: function[T0: MeetSemilattice](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or list_meet[T0](x1, x0) = x1 }[S](List.nil[S], h)
function(x0: List[S]) { forall(x1: S) { list_meet(x1, x0) <= x1 } = p(x0) }(List.nil[S])
let w0: S satisfy { not list_meet(w0, List.nil[S]) <= w0 }
function(x0: S) { list_meet(x0, List.nil[S]) <= x0 }(w0)

function[T0: MeetSemilattice](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or x3.meet(list_meet[T0](x0, x1)) = list_meet[T0](x3, x2) }[S](next, rest, List.cons(next, rest), h)
function(x0: List[S]) { forall(x1: S) { list_meet(x1, x0) <= x1 } = p(x0) }(List.cons(next, rest))
let w0: S satisfy { not list_meet(w0, List.cons(next, rest)) <= w0 }
function(x0: S) { list_meet(x0, List.cons(next, rest)) <= x0 }(w0)
function[T0](x0: List[T0] -> Bool) { not forall(x1: T0, x2: List[T0]) { not x0(x2) or x0(List.cons[T0](x1, x2)) } or not x0(List.nil[T0]) or forall(x3: List[T0]) { x0(x3) } = true }[S](p)
function[T0](x0: List[T0] -> Bool, x1: List[T0]) { not forall(x2: T0, x3: List[T0]) { not x0(x3) or x0(List.cons[T0](x2, x3)) } or not x0(List.nil[T0]) or x0(x1) }[S](p, tail)
let w0: S satisfy { exists(k0: List[S]) { p(k0) and not p(List.cons(w0, k0)) } }
let w1: List[S] satisfy { p(w1) and not p(List.cons(w0, w1)) }
function(x0: List[S], x1: S) { not p(x0) or p(List.cons(x1, x0)) }(w1, w0)
function(x0: List[S]) { forall(x1: S) { list_meet(x1, x0) <= x1 } = p(x0) }(tail)
function(x0: List[S]) { not p(x0) or forall(x1: S) { list_meet(x1, x0) <= x1 } = true }(tail)
function(x0: List[S], x1: S) { not p(x0) or list_meet(x1, x0) <= x1 }(tail, head)
function[T0: MeetSemilattice](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or list_meet[T0](x1, x0) = x1 }[S](List.nil[S], h)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: List[T0]) { not x1 ∈ x0 or List.cons[T0](x2, x3) != x0 or x1 ∈ x3 or x1 = x2 }[S](List.cons(h, List.nil[S]), y, h, List.nil[S])

function(x0: List[S]) { forall(x1: S, x2: S) { not x2 ∈ List.cons(x1, x0) or list_meet(x1, x0) <= x2 } = p(x0) }(List.nil[S])
let w0: S satisfy { exists(k0: S) { k0 ∈ List.cons(w0, List.nil[S]) and not list_meet(w0, List.nil[S]) <= k0 } }
function[T0: MeetSemilattice](x0: T0, x1: List[T0]) { list_meet[T0](x0, x1) <= x0 }[S](w0, List.nil[S])
let w1: S satisfy { w1 ∈ List.cons(w0, List.nil[S]) and not list_meet(w0, List.nil[S]) <= w1 }
function(x0: S, x1: S) { not x1 ∈ List.cons(x0, List.nil[S]) or x0 = x1 or false = true }(w0, w1)

function[T0: JoinSemilattice](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or list_join[T0](x1, x0) = x1 }[S](List.nil[S], h)
function(x0: List[S]) { forall(x1: S) { x1 <= list_join(x1, x0) } = p(x0) }(List.nil[S])
let w0: S satisfy { not w0 <= list_join(w0, List.nil[S]) }
function(x0: S) { x0 <= list_join(x0, List.nil[S]) }(w0)
